sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108473" key="u(pokagkeli/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποκαγκελίζω</orth>, dub. sens., <sense id="n108473.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἔχοντες φακούς, ὑποκαγκελίζοντας τοὺς ὀφθαλμούς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.221</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
